title: cynosurus cristatus var. obliquatus
intro: Cynosurus cristatus var. obliquatus, also known as the bent hard-grass or bent grass, is a type of grass plant in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and alleviating symptoms of various health conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor burns. Herbal preparations of Cynosurus cristatus var. obliquatus can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to apply directly to affected areas or taken internally under medical supervision.
